{{Quote|No, it was the food—definitely the food.|Luke Skywalker discusses his "real" reason for leaving Tatooine|<ref name="Star by Star" />}}
'''Dustcrepes''', also called '''dustcrêpes''' were a light [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooinian]] food that consisted of dried bread and a herbivore meat filling, commonly served with [[nausage]]. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was known to enjoy them.

==Description==
This light crepe was made of a dry type of [[Bread/Legends|bread]], consisting of [[Wheat/Legends|wheat]]. It also had a filling of herbivore meat.<ref name="Star by Star" /><ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dustcrepes appeared in the [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. They could be made by [[Merchant/Legends|traders]], a [[:w:c:swg:Profession|profession]] that specialized in the creation of various [[:w:c:swg:Item|goods]], including [[:w:c:swg:Food|food]]. [[:w:c:swg:Trader|Traders]] took the place of [[Chef/Legends|chefs]] and [[Artisan/Legends|artisans]], after those professions were removed from the game during the [[:w:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]] of [[November 15]], [[2005]].
